{{CargoRelic
|name=Medicine Gourd
|class_id=20451
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This gourd is grown from an ancient and harsh method and requires a lot of profound energy to nurture. Once it is ripe, however, it will produce healing nectar that can replace conventional medicine, making it essential for anyone!
|fame=29
|art=19
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=13
|ss1=Minion Recovery SPD +0.5%
|ss2=Minion Recovery SPD +1%
|ss3=Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|ss4=Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|ss7=Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%<br> (Awakened)
}}
